og_tags.og:title: Woodinville Sports Club | Tennis, Golf, Pickleball, Fitness & Events in Woodinville, WA
og_tags.og:description: Join Woodinville Sports Club in WA for premier tennis, golf, fitness, and pickleball facilities. Discover our programs for all ages and skill levels.

records.title: RPM Adult 2.0
records.meta_description: For players with little to no tennis experience or instruction. In this class, players will learn the five basic strokes, proper grip techniques, and basic footwork. These foundational skills are essential for progressing in the sport of tennis.

og_tags.og:title: RPM Adult 2.0
og_tags.og:description: For players with little to no tennis experience or instruction. In this class, players will learn the five basic strokes, proper grip techniques, and basic footwork. These foundational skills are essential for progressing in the sport of tennis.

records.title: RPM Adult 2.5
records.meta_description: Players who have progressed past the 2.0 class and are preparing for or wanting to compete. This class focuses on improving stroke fundamentals, introducing spin for better ball control, and sustaining rallies at a moderate pace.

og_tags.og:title: RPM Adult 2.5
og_tags.og:description: Players who have progressed past the 2.0 class and are preparing for or wanting to compete. This class focuses on improving stroke fundamentals, introducing spin for better ball control, and sustaining rallies at a moderate pace.

records.title: RPM Adult 3.0
records.meta_description: For players who have progressed past the 2.5 class. This class aims to enhance stroke fundamentals further, introduce advanced footwork, and develop match strategies. Players will work on sustaining faster-paced rallies and improving overall game tactics.

og_tags.og:title: RPM Adult 3.0
og_tags.og:description: For players who have progressed past the 2.5 class. This class aims to enhance stroke fundamentals further, introduce advanced footwork, and develop match strategies. Players will work on sustaining faster-paced rallies and improving overall game tactics.

Limited spots available for both coaches and serious players looking to reach their highest potential.

og_tags.og:title: WSC 2025 Pricing & Policy Changes
og_tags.og:description: Dear Valued Members and Guests,As we look back on 2024, we are excited to see how much the WSC community has grown, with memberships increasing by 20% and expansion in our offerings across tennis, golf, pickleball, and fitness. As our club continues to grow and thrive, we're implementing several important updates effective January 1, 2025. These changes will enable our club to reinvest into the team, our member community, and the facility. For each change, we want to share what's changing, why w

og_tags.og:title: WSC Updated Court Booking Guide
og_tags.og:description: WSC Members - We are moving to ONE reservation type for tennis bookings moving forward. It is called “Tennis Court Booking (V)”. The (V) stands for variable as you can pick 30, 60, or 90 minute duration at time of booking. Three additional reminders: • Your reservation will not go through if it creates a 30 minute gap on the scheduler. We are doing this to maximize court availability for all our members and passholders. • You must add other players’ names, including guests (non-members), to your

og_tags.og:description: Summer tennis for all levels: Tier 1 Core to Academy. World-class coaching, professional facilities, daily athletic development. Ages 3-18. Full &1/2-day options.

records.title: Woodinville Tennis | Indoor Courts, Lessons & Programs | Woodinville Sports Club
records.meta_description: Experience premier tennis at Woodinville Sports Club. 8 indoor courts, 1 clay court. No monthly dues. Book courts, join elite junior programs, adult clinics. Pay-as-you-play flexibility. Your tennis journey starts here!

records.title: Tier 1 Performance | WSC
records.meta_description: Tier 1 Performance in Woodinville, WA, is the Pacific Northwest's premier full-time tennis academy. We offer unparalleled training: expert coaching, strength & conditioning, mental skills, recovery, and a dedicated on-site house for athletes. Prepare for college tennis and beyond. Get a consultation.

records.title: Tier 1 Core Tennis (RPM) | WSC
records.meta_description: Elevate your child's tennis skills with Tier 1 Core Tennis (formerly RPM) at Woodinville Sports Club. From beginners to elite players, our structured programs offer personalized coaching and clear developmental pathways for ages 5-18+.

records.title: WSC Tier 1 Golf Academy
records.meta_description:
Experience Woodinville's new Tier 1 Golf Academy. Youth ages 7-18, from first swing to elite performance 
Train at our heated driving range and in our new indoor Swing Lab. Driving range includes grass tees and a 2.5 acre short-game practice area. Academy classes are taught by WGTF Master Certified Coach, Daniel Jarvie
records.h1_text: Tier 1 Golf Academy | NEW   Tier 1 Junior Golf Academy

records.title: Tier 1 Full-Time Golf Academy Form | WSC
records.meta_description: Give your kids an unforgettable summer at Woodinville Sports Club! Tennis camps, golf camps, multi-sport camps and even a unique Farm Camp for all ages and skill levels. Register early and save!
